data.title: Millennium Management's Bitcoin And Ethereum ETFs Purchased In Q4 Suffer $22.7 Million Loss Amid Crypto Slump
data.description: Israel Englander‘s Millennium Management purchased Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) exchange-traded funds in the fourth quarter, according to a February 14 13F-HR filing w

data.title: Linus Tech Tips Rips Into Nvidia Over RTX 5060 Launch: 'The Game Has Gotten So Stupid That I'm Not Willing To Play It Anymore'
data.description: Linus Tech Tips' Linus Sebastian criticized Nvidia for its handling of the RTX 5060 Ti launch, citing misleading marketing.

data.title: EXCLUSIVE: Ligand Subsidiary Pelthos Therapeutics To Combine with Channel Therapeutics Creating Pain Medicines Focused Entity
data.description: Ligand and Channel Therapeutics to merge in $50 million deal to launch Zelsuvmi for molluscum and advance NaV 1.7 chronic pain programs.

data.title: Nasdaq Dips 3% Amid Plunge In Nvidia, AMD: Greed Index Remains In 'Extreme Fear' Zone
Google Faces A Mammoth $6.6 Billion UK Class Action Lawsuit Over Reported Ad Price Inflation, Market Abuse
data.description: Google, a part of Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ: GOOGL) (NASDAQ: GOOG), is confronted with a £5 billion ($6.6 billion) class action lawsuit in the U.K. The company is accused of exploiting its dominant market position in the online search industry.
